options.name: <lib_name>
options.description: Specifies the name of a library to be updated

options.name: -compress_level
options.description: Sets the compression level of a specified library

options.name: -create_cdsinfo_tag
options.description: Adds a cdsinfo.tag file to the specified library

options.name: -tech_attach_to_reference
options.description: Converts the specified library to use a tech reference from the attached tech
